records.m_Talk_ENG: We're free today, so let's take it easy!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're free today, so let's take it easy!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're free today, so let's take it easy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe I'll do some fixing today!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe I'll do some fixing today!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe I'll do some fixing today!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka? How are you feeling today?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka? How are you feeling today?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka? How are you feeling today?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Ooh... You're cold to the touch. It feels smooth and hard
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Ooh... You're cold to the touch. It feels smooth and hard
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Ooh... You're cold to the touch. It feels smooth and hard
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop it. You're giving me the creeps.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop it. You're giving me the creeps.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop it. You're giving me the creeps.

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but it's okay when it's just us girls, no...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but it's okay when it's just us girls, no...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but it's okay when it's just us girls, no...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not one bit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not one bit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not one bit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Waah... That's so unfair...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Waah... That's so unfair...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Waah... That's so unfair...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm glad that you don't have any trouble moving now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm glad that you don't have any trouble moving now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm glad that you don't have any trouble moving now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was worried about what will happen if something broke again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was worried about what will happen if something broke again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was worried about what will happen if something broke again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that why you didn't want to me to go to the pharmacy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that why you didn't want to me to go to the pharmacy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that why you didn't want to me to go to the pharmacy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? No, that's not why... Eheheh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? No, that's not why... Eheheh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? No, that's not why... Eheheh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's that stupid face again...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's that stupid face again...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's that stupid face again...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are you feeling? Do you feel like something's been repaired?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are you feeling? Do you feel like something's been repaired?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are you feeling? Do you feel like something's been repaired?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure. I don't feel any different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure. I don't feel any different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure. I don't feel any different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... I wonder why it's not working this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... I wonder why it's not working this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... I wonder why it's not working this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, I haven't thought of where I need to fix you all this time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, I haven't thought of where I need to fix you all this time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, I haven't thought of where I need to fix you all this time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ehehe... All I've been thinking was that I needed to fix you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ehehe... All I've been thinking was that I needed to fix you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ehehe... All I've been thinking was that I needed to fix you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, where do you want to fix me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, where do you want to fix me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, where do you want to fix me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... Since you're now able to sleep, I want to make you able to eat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... Since you're now able to sleep, I want to make you able to eat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... Since you're now able to sleep, I want to make you able to eat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think it'll be so much fun if we can eat together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think it'll be so much fun if we can eat together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think it'll be so much fun if we can eat together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think that's going to work...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think that's going to work...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think that's going to work...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you step aside for a second?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you step aside for a second?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you step aside for a second?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Flight, boosters, scans... They're all not working.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Flight, boosters, scans... They're all not working.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Flight, boosters, scans... They're all not working.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess I'll have to fight with my bare hands for the time being...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess I'll have to fight with my bare hands for the time being...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess I'll have to fight with my bare hands for the time being...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. It's because I'm not good enough...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. It's because I'm not good enough...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. It's because I'm not good enough...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you being sorry? I can take on C.O.s with just my hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you being sorry? I can take on C.O.s with just my hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you being sorry? I can take on C.O.s with just my hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You opened your body once, right, Mavka?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You opened your body once, right, Mavka?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You opened your body once, right, Mavka?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's okay with you, could I take a look inside?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's okay with you, could I take a look inside?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's okay with you, could I take a look inside?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh... It's full of stuff that I think I shouldn't touch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh... It's full of stuff that I think I shouldn't touch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh... It's full of stuff that I think I shouldn't touch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? But this part is just empty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? But this part is just empty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? But this part is just empty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That part was empty from the beginning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That part was empty from the beginning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That part was empty from the beginning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm guessing it has <color=#ffd34c>some use</color>, but... I don't really know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm guessing it has <color=#ffd34c>some use</color>, but... I don't really know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm guessing it has <color=#ffd34c>some use</color>, but... I don't really know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're trying to do something weird again, aren't you?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're trying to do something weird again, aren't you?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're trying to do something weird again, aren't you?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no! I was being serious this time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no! I was being serious this time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no! I was being serious this time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh?! An alert?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh?! An alert?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh?! An alert?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's another Corruption disaster?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's another Corruption disaster?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's another Corruption disaster?!
